name: Fruit and Beets
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup natural apricot or orange fruit spread,
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut beet tops leaving 2 inches attached to the beets.
2. Scrub beets thoroughly.
3. Put beets in a 6-quart Presto pressure cooker. Add 1-1/2 cups water. Close cover securely.
4. Place pressure regulator on vent pipe.
5. Cook for 15 minutes at 15 pounds pressure, with the pressure regulator rocking slowly.
6. Cool cooker immediately.
7. Remove beets and liquid. Cool beets under cold water and slip off skins.
8. Cut into cubes or slices.
9. Put fruit spread, lemon juice, and seasonings in pressure cooker; heat and stir to soften spread.
10. Add beets, stirring to coat and heat.
Makes 6 servings.
